t.t-value: True if show_variations is None else show_variations
True if show_ribbons is None else show_ribbons

span.class: oe_product_image_img_wrapper oe_product_image_img_wrapper_primary d-flex h-100 justify-content-center align-items-center

t.t-if: 'base_price' in template_price_vals and (template_price_vals['base_price'] > template_price_vals['price_reduce']) and (template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale)
t.name: product_base_price

t.t-if: prod00uct_variant_id and template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale

t.t-value: True if show_variations is None else show_variations

span.class: oe_product_image_img_wrapper oe_product_image_img_wrapper_primary d-flex h-100 justify-content-center align-items-center

t.t-if: 'base_price' in template_price_vals and (template_price_vals['base_price'] > template_price_vals['price_reduce']) and (template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale)
t.name: product_base_price

t.t-if: prod00uct_variant_id and template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale

div.t-attf-class: product-action mb-2 mb-xl-0 #{'' if is_active_cart else 'position-static '}

t.t-value: True if show_variations is None else show_variations
True if show_ribbons is None else show_ribbons

span.class: oe_product_image_img_wrapper oe_product_image_img_wrapper_primary d-flex h-100 justify-content-center align-items-center

t.t-if: prod00uct_variant_id and template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale
'base_price' in template_price_vals and (template_price_vals['base_price'] > template_price_vals['price_reduce']) and (template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale)
t.name: product_base_price

t.t-value: True if show_variations is None else show_variations
True if show_ribbons is None else show_ribbons

span.class: oe_product_image_img_wrapper oe_product_image_img_wrapper_primary d-flex h-100 justify-content-center align-items-center

t.t-if: 'base_price' in template_price_vals and (template_price_vals['base_price'] > template_price_vals['price_reduce']) and (template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale)
t.name: product_base_price
